title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Container Corporation of India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Container Corporation of India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Container Corporation of India family as a Fleet Manager in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Container Corporation of India:
Container Corporation of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Container Corporation of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
